evals.prompt: I need to write a user guide for a new CAM feature called 'Portfolio Snapshot'. It lets users take a point-in-time snapshot of their entire portfolio — all accounts, positions, and balances — and save it for later comparison. Users can trigger it manually or schedule it daily. It's currently in beta. Can you draft the full user guide page for this?
evals.expected_output: A complete markdown file with correct VuePress frontmatter (title, date, permalink, categories, tags, order, subTitle), proper section structure (Introduction, Important Notes for beta, User Guide with sub-sections for manual and scheduled snapshots), correct CAM terminology, English-only content, screenshot placeholders, and appropriate callout boxes.

assertions.description: File starts with --- and includes title, date, permalink, categories, order, and subTitle fields
Permalink matches the /user-guide/<slug>/ pattern
Contains an Introduction section explaining what Portfolio Snapshot does
Includes a note about beta status (Important Notes section or callout box)
Mentions both manual trigger and scheduled/daily snapshot modes
Contains at least one image reference using ![...](...) syntax
No Chinese characters appear anywhere in the content
Uses CAM-specific terms like portfolio, account, NAV, or similar

evals.prompt: We're adding a new section to the Live Risk manual about a feature called 'Threshold Breach History'. It shows a log of all past alert rule breaches with timestamps, severity, and which portfolio triggered it. Users can filter by date range and export to CSV. Write the section content I can add to the existing live-risk.md file.
evals.expected_output: A well-structured markdown section (not a full file) with a heading, intro paragraph, step-by-step instructions for accessing and using the feature, field explanations, and screenshot placeholders. Should follow the existing Live Risk doc style.

assertions.description: Does NOT contain YAML frontmatter (no --- block at the top of the file)
Starts with or contains a ## or ### level heading for Threshold Breach History
Mentions timestamp, severity, and portfolio in the content
Mentions CSV export functionality
Mentions date range filtering capability
Contains at least one image reference using ![...](...) syntax
No Chinese characters appear anywhere in the content

evals.prompt: Help me write a user guide for setting up a DeFi wallet account in CAM. The user needs to: 1) go to Ops & Accounting > API Account Setup > DeFi, 2) click Add Account, 3) select the chain (Ethereum, Solana, etc.), 4) paste their wallet address, 5) optionally add a label and portfolio tag, 6) click Confirm. There are some notes: read-only, no private key needed, supports EVM chains and Solana.
evals.expected_output: A complete onboarding-style guide with numbered step headings, screenshot placeholders after each step, correct frontmatter, important notes section about read-only access and supported chains, and proper CAM terminology.

assertions.description: File starts with --- and includes title, date, permalink, categories, order, and subTitle fields
Uses numbered headings like ### 1. or ### Step 1 for each setup step
Covers all 6 steps: DeFi navigation, Add Account, chain selection, wallet address input, label/portfolio tag, and Confirm
Notes that no private key is needed and/or access is read-only
Mentions EVM chains and/or Solana as supported chains
Contains at least one image reference using ![...](...) syntax
No Chinese characters appear anywhere in the content
